title: Update for https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1299 + update tests
body:
#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

Update c/image from a WIP https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1299:

- to eventually benefit from the better error messages
- for now, to exercise that PR to find issues, if any
- for now, to see if any Podman tests need adjusting.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mtrmac* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

c/image has now been updated, and vendoring that will break Podman tests.

So, please review/merge this PR, so that Podman tests match c/image and future vendor dances don’t stumble on the test failures.
@mtrmac please rebase and repush so we can merge.
